title: Engine Method Catalog
description: Schema for GET /api/engines/:id/methods. Any engine returns an array of these. GenomeHub renders UI from this schema without knowing what the engine does internally.

id.description: Unique method identifier. Used in POST /api/engines/:id/methods/:methodId

name.description: Human-readable method name for the UI

description.description: What this method does, shown below the name

async.description: If true, the engine returns 202 { job_id } instead of streaming the result immediately. GenomeHub polls GET /api/jobs/:job_id for progress, then fetches GET /api/jobs/:job_id/stream on completion. Default false.

steps.description: Optional internal phases for this method. GenomeHub wraps these with hub bookend steps (Dispatching, Saving, Complete). If omitted, defaults to a single 'Processing' step.

key.description: Unique step identifier reported in poll response step field

label.description: Human-readable step name for the UI

name.description: Parameter key sent in the request body

type.description: file = GenomeHub uploads a file to the engine. string/integer = plain value passed through. select = dropdown from options array.

description.description: Shown as label or help text

default.description: Default value. Shown as placeholder for string/integer, pre-selects for select.

accept.description: For file params: accepted formats to filter the file picker. e.g. ["gb", "fa"]. Omit to accept any file.

description.description: Shown as subtitle in the dropdown

parameters.description: Key-value pairs displayed as badges when the option is selected. The engine's internal config — GenomeHub renders but does not interpret.

type.description: Always file. GenomeHub stores the result.

examples.name: Library Design
examples.description: Design and score a CRISPR guide library targeting gene promoters.

options.label: SpCas9
options.description: Streptococcus pyogenes Cas9. The most widely used CRISPR nuclease.
